use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING A GLIOMA CHARACTERIZED BY AN IDHI MUTATION FOLLOWING SURGERY, WHEREIN THE GLIOMA IS GRADE 2 ASTROCYTOMA OR OLIGODENDROGLIOMA
A METHOD OF TREATING A CANCER CHARACTERIZED BY AN IDH1 OR IDH2 MUTATION OR COMBINATION THEREOF FOLLOWING SURGERY, WHEREIN THE CANCER IS GRADE 2 ASTROCYTOMA OR OLIGODENDROGLIOMA

indications.text:
VORANIGO is indicated for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients 12 years and older with
Grade 2 astrocytoma or oligodendroglioma with a susceptible isocitrate dehydrogenase-1 (IDH1) or
isocitrate dehydrogenase-2 (IDH2) mutation, as detected by an FDA-approved test, following surgery
includin...

isocitrate dehydrogenase-2 (IDH2) mutation following surgery including biopsy, sub-total resection, or
